name: ☆ Bojack Horseman.
description:
✿𓏼𝅙𝅙𝅙𝅙。 “Well, life's a bitch and then you die, right?" ◟ ͜𓏼˚̣̣̣

i’m so normal about bojack ahahahhhhaah i don’t like him he’s the worst

i spent like more than a month procrastinating, ive only been consuming media that’s related to bojack when im alone help me

yeah, this is very self indulgent, most of the chats are probably from me lol

anyway if there’s any starved bojack fans i hope you like this, i tried making it accurate urghhshhs its somewhere around season 1-2 bojack. (　˙-˙　) btw, if u want to add any characters, just search them up on wikipedia or smth and insert it into the chat memory

oh bbojack……….:..the man you are…. (diane is my second favorite tho, she’s me irl)
